sections.bio: Consultant Software Engineer at Blue Reply. I build enterprise-grade applications with Angular, Spring Boot, and cloud microservices.

projects.name: Sviluppo Applicativo Aeronautico
projects.description: Sviluppo e manutenzione di un applicativo critico per il motore EJ200 dell'Eurofighter. Migrazione da architettura monolitica a microservizi e implementazione di nuove funzionalità in collaborazione con team cross-funzionali.

elements.role: Full Stack Software Engineer · consulente per Blue Reply

projects.name: Progetto Vites
projects.description: Sviluppatore chiave per la trasformazione digitale dei sistemi assicurativi enterprise. Progettazione di un generatore di interfacce JSON-configurable integrato con microservizi Spring Boot, con riduzione >50% dei tempi di implementazione frontend. Frontend Angular moderno e scalabile.

projects.name: Progetto Middleware ESB
projects.description: Sviluppo e manutenzione microservizi layer ESB con Apache Camel e Spring Boot. Gestione code Kafka per message brokering tra sistemi core bancari. Monitoring con Kibana e Dynatrace. Pipeline CI/CD tramite Jenkins su OpenShift.

projects.name: Progetto IoT Asset Monitoring
projects.description: Monitoraggio real-time sensori industriali IoT. Frontend Angular, backend Express.js, dati sensori gestiti con Cassandra (DB distribuito NoSQL).

projects.name: Progetto INESS
projects.description: Sviluppo e manutenzione dell'applicazione INESS (WPF/.NET, MVVM) per logistica aeronautica. Creazione test automatici con Telerik Test Studio e Eggplant, riducendo l'effort QA.

elements.description: Focused on software development, algorithms, and practical project implementations.
Intensive 700-hour program in frontend and backend web development, culminating in a comprehensive food delivery application developed in a collaborative team environment.

elements.degree: Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria della Sicurezza
elements.description: Multidisciplinary security engineering programme covering risk management, system resilience, and safety-critical processes, with modules on information security.
Specialised in structural and geotechnical engineering with practical construction management experience.

elements.name: University Project Work
elements.description: Hotel booking and reservation web application built with Python, HTML, and CSS. Custom routing framework from scratch — no external libraries. Features: user authentication, room availability checks, booking management.

elements.name: AiPocondriaco
elements.description: Symptom-analysis web app powered by machine learning. Users input symptoms and receive a ranked list of possible conditions with detailed health information.

elements.name: Deliveboo
elements.description: Team project — food delivery web app inspired by Deliveroo. Restaurant browsing, menus, order tracking, user authentication, and secure payment processing.

sections.secondaryTitleText: Open to new opportunities and collaborations. Drop me a line — I always reply.
